vocab.word: have a whale of a time
vocab.meaning: có một khoảng thời gian cực kỳ vui vẻ
vocab.example: Whenever we went to the local water park, my siblings and I would have a whale of a time splashing around.

vocab.meaning: rất thân thiết và luôn quấn quýt bên nhau
vocab.example: I used to play with my neighbor every day; we were as thick as thieves throughout our primary school years.

vocab.meaning: mải mê đến quên cả thời gian
vocab.example: I would often lose track of time while playing hide-and-seek, only realizing it was late when the sun went down.

vocab.word: have one's head in the clouds
vocab.meaning: đầu óc để trên mây / hay mơ mộng
vocab.example: I was the kind of child who always had my head in the clouds, imagining I was a superhero saving the world.

vocab.word: at the top of one's lungs
vocab.meaning: hết mức (thường dùng cho việc ca hát hoặc hò hét)
vocab.example: Our favorite activity was gathering on the porch and singing popular nursery rhymes at the top of our lungs.

vocab.meaning: tìm thấy niềm vui/sự thú vị từ việc gì
vocab.example: I really got a kick out of catching dragonflies in the garden during the humid summer holidays.

vocab.meaning: luôn vận động / không lúc nào nghỉ ngơi
vocab.example: As a hyperactive kid, I was always on the go, moving from one game to another without ever getting tired.

vocab.meaning: rất dễ dàng (thường nói về các trò chơi hoặc kỹ năng)
vocab.example: Climbing the old oak tree in our yard used to be a breeze for me, though it looks quite daunting now.

vocab.word: put one's heart and soul into
vocab.meaning: dồn hết tâm trí và sức lực vào việc gì
vocab.example: I would put my heart and soul into building sandcastles on the beach, making sure every tower was perfect.

vocab.meaning: bắt đầu thích cái gì/ai đó ngay từ đầu
vocab.example: I immediately took a shine to playing the piano when my parents first introduced me to the instrument.
